description: Plugin-distributed hooks for revenue-operations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags RevOps anti-patterns (stage with no exit criteria, hard-coded comp/quota figures without source, PII in plaintext, forecast asserted with no methodology). Set REVENUE_OPERATIONS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
